noticeItems: It is quite important to bring the card to the hospital.
Take medicines according to instructions of the doctor.
Registration Timings are from 8:30 am to 12:00 pm.
OPD days are on Monday, Wednesday, Friday.
config.cautionText: Smoking, Tobacco chewing can cause cancer, heart diseases and ASTHMA.
